repair_memory_selection.selection_rationale: The current failure is a TilingFunc compilation error where the code calls setter methods (set_N, set_C, etc.) that do not exist on the TilingData class. These memories are directly transferable to ca6k_00414, as they share the same error class, toolchain stage (02-build/opbuild), and operator category (torch#1).
